segments.text: Fair to call that Neo's bread and butter
segments.original_text: ネオ選手のお箱といっても構わないでしょう

segments.original_text: クーマンNB相当むずいですけどね

full_text: That's a KO! Fair to call that Neo's bread and butter Kuuman's neutral B is pretty tricky though
